allow: Bash(curl -s -I https://easytogive.vercel.app/privacy 2>&1 | head -1 && curl -s https://easytogive.vercel.app/privacy 2>&1 | grep -c "." | head -1)
Bash(curl -s -I https://easytogive.vercel.app/terms 2>&1 | head -1 && curl -s https://easytogive.vercel.app/terms 2>&1 | grep -c "." | head -1)
Bash(curl -s -I https://easytogive.vercel.app/tax-faq 2>&1 | head -1 && curl -s https://easytogive.vercel.app/tax-faq 2>&1 | grep -c "." | head -1)
Bash(curl -s -I https://easytogive.vercel.app/compliance 2>&1 | head -1 && curl -s https://easytogive.vercel.app/compliance 2>&1 | grep -c "." | head -1)
Bash(curl -s https://easytogive.vercel.app/auth/signup 2>&1 | grep -E "Terms of Service|Privacy Policy" | head -5)
